title: Apex Weapons&Tools
description: A vanilla-friendly resource pack that retextures Minecraft weapons and tools with cleaner, more detailed designs while preserving the original art style.
body:
Apex 1.21.11 Weapons & Tools
Apex 1.21.11 Weapons & Tools is a vanilla-friendly Minecraft resource pack that refreshes the appearance of weapons and tools.

This pack focuses on improving visual clarity, detail, and consistency across all major tool and weapon types while preserving Minecraft’s original aesthetic. Each item is redesigned to feel sharper and more distinct, making progression through material tiers more visually rewarding.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/n1e8FSd_rzQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- Included Items
- Swords
- Pickaxes
- Axes
- Shovels
- Hoes
- Spears
- Mace
- Trident
- Flint&Steel
- Bow
- CrossBow
- Arrow
- Spectral Arrow
- Tiped Arrows
- Fishing Wrod
- Carot On A Stick
- Warped Fungus On A Stick
- Brush
- Shears
- Spyglass
- Fireworck Rockets
- Stick
- Totem Of Undying
- Compass
- Recovory Compass
- Clock
- Shields
  
If you’re looking for a refined vanilla look that upgrades your weapons and tools while keeping Minecraft’s original feel intact, Apex 1.21.11 Weapons & Tools is designed to fit seamlessly into your world.

[Planet Minecraft Download](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/apex-1-21-11-weapons-amp-tools/)
